```javascript
function solve(nums) {
    const n = nums.length;
    if (n <= 1) {
        return 0;
    }

    // A_prev stores A_{i-1}, the minimum required increment for the previous element.
    // We start with A_{-1} = 0.
    let a_prev = 0;
    
    // totalCost accumulates the sum of all positive increments (max(0, A_i - A_{i-1}))
    let totalCost = 0;

    // Iterate i from 0 to n-1 to calculate A_i
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        let a_current;

        if (i === 0) {
            // A_0 must be 0 to minimize cost, as A_0 >= 0.
            a_current = 0;
        } else {
            // R_{i-1} = nums[i-1] - nums[i]
            const required_difference = nums[i - 1] - nums[i];
            
            // A_i must be >= A_{i-1} + R_{i-1} AND A_i must be >= 0.
            // We choose the minimum required A_i.
            // We use Math.max(0, ...) to ensure A_i >= 0.
            a_current = Math.max(0, a_prev + required_difference);
        }
        
        // The cost contribution at index i is the positive jump from A_{i-1} to A_i.
        // Cost += max(0, A_i - A_{i-1})
        const cost_increase = Math.max(0, a_current - a_prev);
        totalCost += cost_increase;
        
        // Update for next iteration
        a_prev = a_current;
    }

    return totalCost;
}
```
